Uniform Tickets

Multi-leg slips assembled from strict_mode picks where every leg lives in the same hit-rate band (Elite / Premium / Strong / Value). Backtest tab shows realized joint hit rates and EV across all graded dates.

Rolling per-(size, bucket) joint hit rate and EV on $1 stakes, computed from all graded slates the assembler has touched. PrizePicks void rule: when ≥1 leg voids (DNP / no action), the slip drops that leg and pays at the next-smaller tier when remaining legs all hit (e.g., 5-leg with 1 void → 4-leg all-hit payout). The Eff Pay column is the average realized multiplier after that adjustment; Wilson Low is the 95% confidence floor on the realized hit rate.
